\tzpentry{ID4166}{Current Density Divergence Field Equation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4166 introduces Current Density Divergence Field Equation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \nabla \cdot \vec{J} = -\frac{\partial \rho_e}{\partial t} \end{equation}
